title: Military rank
content:
{{Top}} {{Youmay|military ranks|the [[Foodstuff/Legends|food product]] "[[Rank (food)|Rank]]," or [[the Rank]], an [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Death/Legends|dead]] zone|linebreak=1}} {{MoreSources}} {{Quote|So if you're a captain, and I'm a Jedi, then technically I outrank you, right?''"
"''In my book, ''experience'' outranks everything.|Jedi Padawan Ahsoka Tano and Clone Captain [[Rex]], upon becoming acquainted with each other for the first time|[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]]}} [[File:Thrawn-ToL.jpg|thumb|262px|Mitth'raw'nuruodo held the military rank of Grand Admiral in the Imperial Navy, indicated by his rank insignia plaque.]] An individual's '''military rank''' was their placement within a military hierarchy. The military forces of the [[Galactic Republic]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the [[Chiss Ascendancy]], the [[Galactic Empire]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the [[New Republic]], [[Imperial Remnants]], the [[First Order]], and the [[Resistance]] all utilized military ranks in their hierarchy. ==Description== ===Overview=== A military rank was an armed forces title used to denote a military [[officer]]'s placement within an established military hierarchy and structure. Military ranks were divided into [[army]] and [[navy]] forces, although governments such as the [[Galactic Empire]] used military ranks for other organizations, such as the [[Imperial Security Bureau]].[[Thrawn (novel)|''Thrawn'']] ===Galactic Republic=== ====Republic Defense Coalition, Judicials, and other forces==== {{Main|Republic Defense Coalition|Judicial Department}} The Republic's enforcement agencies, such as the [[Republic Defense Coalition]]''[[The High Republic: Light of the Jedi]]'' and the [[Judicial Department]] utilized ranks.''[[Rise of the Separatists]]'' The RDC used the ranks of [[admiral]], naval [[captain]], [[ensign]], and [[Petty Officer|petty officer]]. The rank of [[provost marshal]] was used within the Judicial Department by both its leader and the leader of the [[Judicial Academy]].[[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] [[Judicial]]s also used the rank of naval captain and [[lieutenant]].{{Film|I}} ====Republic Military==== {{Main|Republic Military|Republic officer|Rank insignia plaque}} The [[Republic Military]] consisted of multiple cadres of [[officer]]s in at least two military branches, the [[Grand Army of the Republic]] and the [[Republic Navy]]. The Armed Forces of the Galactic Republic consisted of [[clone trooper officer]]s operating in army and naval roles, [[Jedi]] officers, and non-clone and non-Jedi [[Republic officer]]s. Jedi officers used the military ranks of [[High Jedi General]],{{BuildFalconCite|18|Guide to the Galaxy}} [[Jedi General]], and [[Jedi Commander]]. These Jedi ranks allowed for Jedi officers to lead both ground and [[Realspace|space]] forces. [[File:TanoTarkinRex.png|thumb|right|300px|From left to right: Clone Captain Rex, Jedi Commander Ahsoka Tano, and Captain Wilhuff Tarkin, each an example of a clone officer, a Jedi officer, and an enlisted officer in the Republic Military, respectively.]] Clone officers used their own ranking system for their cadre. [[Clone Marshal Commander]] was a [[corps]]-level rank that was achievable for a [[clone trooper]],''[[Dark Disciple]]'' and was followed by [[Clone Commander|Clone ARC Commander]]{{SWCT|set=Rank & File|cardname=Clone ARC Commander Blitz}} and [[Clone Commander]]. The ranks of [[Clone Captain]][[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] and [[Clone major]] followed,[[Star Wars: Complete Vehicles (2018)|''Star Wars: Complete Vehicles'' (2018)]] and then [[Clone Lieutenant]], [[Clone Sergeant]], [[Clone Corporal]],{{TCW|Padawan Lost}} and [[Clone Private]]. Clone Private was the lowest rank in the Republic Army.''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]'' Prior to officially graduating from training, clones used the rank of [[clone cadet]].{{TCW|Clone Cadets}} Clone Commander, Clone Captain,{{TCW|Cloak of Darkness}} and Clone Corporal were also used as naval ranks.{{TCW|Fugitive}} Non-clone and non-Jedi Republic officers used multiple military ranks. [[Governor-General]] was a military and political rank within the Republic, when [[galaxy]] [[sector]] was under a state of emergency. [[Adjutant General]] was a senior military rank for both the Grand Army of the Republic and the Republic Navy.{{EncyclopediaCite|Imperial Officers and Agents}} For the Republic Navy, [[flag officer]] ranks consisted of [[Admiral]] and [[Rear Admiral]].{{Databank|nils-tenant|Nils Tenant}} Following flag ranks, was the rank of naval [[Captain]]{{TCW|The Citadel (episode)}} and [[Lieutenant Commander]].{{BuildFalconCite|52|Starship Fact File}} [[Lieutenant]] was a subordinate [[junior officer]] rank.''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'' {{C|Card: Barrow Oicunn}} In the Republic, the rank of [[midshipman]] was also used.{{StoryCite|story=The Final Order|book=From a Certain Point of View: The Empire Strikes Back}} In the Grand Army of the Republic, the rank of [[General]] was used,''[[Collapse of the Republic]]'' as was [[Brigadier General]] and the subordinate rank of [[colonel]].{{TCW|Secret Weapons}} The rank of captain was additionally used in the military's [[Republic Intelligence]] branch. The rank of [[Master Chief]] was additionally used. ===Chiss Ascendancy=== {{Main|Ascendancy military|Chiss officer}} The [[Ascendancy military|military]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy]] contained the [[Chiss Defense Force]] and the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet]]. Following a [[Chiss officer]]'s promotion to a flag officer, the Chiss had to renounce all family ties and pledge themselves fully to the military. The military ranks of [[Supreme Admiral]] and [[Supreme General]] were at the pinnacle of the hierarchy, and followed by [[Fleet Admiral]] and [[Senior General]], Admiral and General, [[Mid Admiral]] and [[Mid General]], and lastly [[Commodore]]. Subsequently, senior officers ranked at [[Senior Captain]], [[Mid Captain]], [[Junior Captain]], [[Senior Commander]], [[Mid Commander]], [[Junior Commander]], and [[Lieutenant Commander]]. [[Junior officer]]s were given the rank of [[lieutenant]], and was followed by [[Senior Warrior]], [[Mid Warrior]], and [[Junior Warrior]].''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil]]'' Personnel within Chiss Academies could hold the rank of colonel. Older [[cadet]]s of the Chiss Ascendancy held the rank of [[Senior Cadet]].''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising]]'' ===Confederacy of Independent Systems=== {{Main|Confederacy military}} [[File:General_Grievous_duing_the_Outer_Rim_Campaign.png|thumb|left|300px|General Grievous, Supreme Commander of the Separatist military]] The [[Confederacy military|armed forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] maintained a composition of [[Separatist officer]]s and [[droid]] officers. Senior-ranking Separatist officers used multiple ranks, including the [[Separatist Droid Army|Separatist Army]] ranks of General and colonel.[[Kanan 9|''Kanan'' 9]] Subordinate to those ranks was [[commandant]], [[commander]],{{TCW|Water War}} and Captain. In the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems Navy|Separatist Navy]], the flag officer rank of Admiral was used,{{TCW|Cat and Mouse}} as was captain.{{TCW|Storm Over Ryloth}} Droid officers, ranging from [[ST-series military strategic analysis and tactics droid]]s,{{TCW|Front Runners}} [[T-series military strategic analysis and tactics droid]]s,{{TCW|Innocents of Ryloth}} [[OOM command battle droid]]s, and standard [[B1-series battle droid]]s used a variety of ranks in army and naval capacities. ST-series droids could use the ranks of general and commander, while T-series droids utilized commander, as did OOM command battle droids.{{TCW|Cargo of Doom}} The commander rank was used in an army and naval role.{{TCW|Jedi Crash}} B1-series battle droids used the ranks of captain, lieutenant,{{IDWAdventuresCite-2017|issue=19|story=Tales from Wild Space: The Big March}} sergeant, and corporal.{{TCW|Rising Malevolence|Rising ''Malevolence''}} ===Galactic Empire=== ====Overview==== {{Main|Imperial Military|Imperial officer|Rank insignia plaque}} [[File:Star_Wars_Darth_Vader_12_Textless_Cover.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Darth Vader held no formal rank in the Imperial Military, but he was regarded as the de facto Commander-in-Chief]] The [[Imperial Military]] was the successor of the Republic Military, adopting the use of the rank insignia plaques and certain military ranks. Imperial military ranks were used in the [[Imperial Army]], the [[Imperial Navy]], the [[Imperial Starfighter Corps]], and certain [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order|COMPNOR agencies]] such as the [[Imperial Security Bureau]]. The [[Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] held no formal rank in the Imperial Military.{{BustCollectionCite|30|Star Wars Universe}} Instead, he was regarded as a "[[lord]]" rather than answering to a direct rank.{{Film|IV}} Thanks to the power imbued within him by [[Galactic Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]],[[Darth Vader (2017) 12|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 12]] however, he was regarded as the informal [[Commander-in-Chief]] of the military. In the aftermath of the [[Cylo Hijacking]], Vader was named the [[supreme commander of the Imperial fleet]]''[[Star Wars: The Rise and Fall of the Galactic Empire]]'' by Palpatine, who formally invested the powers of the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)|Supreme Commander]][[Darth Vader (2015) 25|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 25]] in Vader's new position. All the same, Vader still considered his rank to be "lord" and continued to hold that title.[[Doctor Aphra (2016) 35|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 35]] ====COMPNOR==== {{Main|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order}} ====Imperial Army==== {{Main|Imperial Army}} The Imperial Army and the Imperial Starfighter Corps used ground-based military ranks, despite the Imperial Starfighter Corps pertaining to the Imperial Navy. The Imperial Security Bureau used both ground-based and naval ranks.''[[Dawn of Rebellion]]'' These military ranks included that of general officer ranks, such as [[Grand General]],''[[Aftermath: Life Debt]]'' [[General]],{{Film|V}} [[Vice General|vice general]], and [[Brigadier General|brigadier general]]. Subordinate ranks included [[colonel]]{{Film|IV}} and [[Lieutenant Colonel|lieutenant colonel]], and rank of [[major]] was also used, inferior to the colonel-level ranks.''[[Lords of the Sith]]'' More junior ground-based ranks in the Galactic Empire included the army rank of [[commander]],{{Film|VI}} [[captain]], and the lesser rank of [[lieutenant]].''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' Following ground-based military ranks included that of [[Staff Sergeant|staff sergeant]],''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]'' [[First Sergeant|first sergeant]],''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' [[Sergeant major]], and [[sergeant]]. The rank of [[corporal]] was followed by that of [[specialist]] and [[private]].''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story The Official Guide]]'' ====Imperial Navy==== {{Main|Imperial Navy}} [[File:ThrawnBriefing-IronSquadron.jpg|thumb|left|300px|As Admiral Kassius Konstantine stands back, Grand Admiral Mitth'raw'nuruodo "Thrawn" speaks to a fellow Imperial officer.]] The [[Imperial Navy's officer corps]] had a variety of naval military ranks in its structure. Flag officers used [[Admiral of the Fleet|Admiral of the Navy]], [[Grand Admiral|grand admiral]], [[Fleet Admiral|fleet admiral]], [[admiral]], [[Vice Admiral|vice admiral]], [[Rear Admiral|rear admiral]], and [[commodore]]. There were also [[sector admiral]]s in the navy's structure.''[[Star Wars: The Rebel Files]]'' Academies could train [[Imperial officer]]s to [[Captain of the Line|captains of the line]], and [[Flag Captain|flag captains]] also existed in the Imperial Navy. The Imperial Navy additionally used commander, [[Lieutenant Commander|lieutenant commander]], captain,{{Databank|captain-brunson|Captain Brunson}}{{Databank|captain-elk|Captain Elk}} and [[gunnery captain]].{{StoryCite|story=The Sith of Datawork|book=From a Certain Point of View}} Subsequent naval ranks were [[Senior Lieutenant|senior lieutenant]], lieutenant, [[Second Lieutenant|second lieutenant]], [[Junior Lieutenant|junior lieutenant]], and [[ensign]]. [[Warrant Officer]] was another military rank used in the navy.[[Star Wars (2020) 21|''Star Wars'' (2020) 21]] Prior to graduation, [[Imperial cadet]]s could be given the rank of [[Cadet First Class]], as well as [[yeoman]]. ====Imperial Starfighter Corps==== The Imperial Starfighter Corps, despite being part of the navy, used several ground-based military ranks. Such ranks included colonel and major,[[Alphabet Squadron (novel)|''Alphabet Squadron'']] and furthermore used the rank of [[Second Lieutenant Commander|second lieutenant commander]], subordinate to that of major.[[TIE Fighter 3|''TIE Fighter'' 3]] The Imperial Starfighter Corps also utilized senior lieutenant, lieutenant, and [[flight officer]].[[TIE Fighter 1|''TIE Fighter'' 1]] ====Other branches==== The Galactic Empire used joint political and military titles, allowing individuals to both govern an area as well as command military forces. [[Grand Moff]]s were at the echelon of the hierarchy, governing [[oversector]]s and the military assets within. [[Moff]]s followed, with each Moff governing a galactic [[sector]]. Subsequent were [[star system]] and [[planet]]ary [[governor]]s, including [[Lieutenant governor|Lieutenant Governor]]s and [[Acting Governor]]s.''[[Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' The [[Imperial Academy]] system utilized the rank of commandant,''[[Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion]]'' while [[Captain-Inspector]],[[Doctor Aphra (2016) 19|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 19]] [[Inspector]], and [[Lieutenant-Inspector]] were used by the Empire's [[Inspectorate]] agency.[[Doctor Aphra (2016) 15|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 15]] The rank of [[sublieutenant]] was also used in the armed forces of the Empire.{{StoryCite|story=End of Watch|book=From a Certain Point of View}} ===Alliance to Restore the Republic=== {{Main|Alliance Military|Rebel command insignia|Alliance officer}} The [[Alliance Military|Alliance Armed Forces]] consisted of multiple branches, each using military ranks as part of their organization. The [[Alliance Army]], [[Ordnance and Supply]], [[Rebel Alliance Intelligence Service]], [[Rebel Alliance Starfighter Corps]], [[Support Services]], and [[Sector Command (Alliance)|Sector Command]] all used the rank of general. Subordinate ranks included colonel, major, commander,''[[Legends of the Alliance]]'' captain, lieutenant, [[First Sergeant]],''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]'' [[sergeant major]], [[logistics sergeant]],''[[Lead by Example]]'' sergeant, corporal, and private. The [[Rebel Alliance Navy]] used naval ranks, such as admiral, [[commodore]],[[Star Wars (2020) 21|''Star Wars'' (2020) 21]] naval captain,''[[Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure]]'' commander, lieutenant commander,{{Rebels|Zero Hour}} lieutenant,and ensign. ===New Republic=== {{Main|New Republic Defense Force|New Republic officer}} The [[New Republic Defense Force]] shared multiple ranks with the preceding Rebel Alliance. Naval ranks included Fleet Admiral, admiral, commodore, naval captain,''[[Shadow Fall: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' commander,''[[Star Wars: Squadrons]]'' lieutenant commander, lieutenant, and ensign. Ground-based ranks included general, [[Lieutenant General]], major, commander, captain, lieutenant,''[[Star Wars: On the Front Lines]]'' [[Staff Sergeant]], [[sergeant major]],[[Aftermath (novel)|''Aftermath'']] sergeant, corporal, and private. ===First Order=== {{Main|First Order military|Rank insignia of the First Order}} [[File:Pryde_VF.png|thumb|left|200px|As Allegiant General, Enric Pryde served as the commanding officer of the army and navy of the First Order ]] The [[First Order]] was a military junta, with its military ranks displayed on [[Rank insignia of the First Order|rank insignia]] on their [[First Order military uniforms|military uniforms]]. The military ranks of [[Allegiant General]] and [[Grand Marshal]] allowed the bearer to command both ground and space forces. [[First Order Army]] ranks included those of general, colonel, major,''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' commander,{{Resistance|The Children from Tehar}} captain,[[Age of Resistance - Kylo Ren 1|''Age of Resistance - Kylo Ren'' 1]] [[First Lieutenant|first lieutenant]],[[Galaxy's Edge 1|''Galaxy's Edge'' 1]] lieutenant,''[[Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge – Last Call]]'' and sergeant. The Order also used the rank of [[High Colonel|high colonel]].''[[Shadow of the Sith]]'' [[First Order Navy]] ranks included senior ranks such as admiral, naval captain, commander, lieutenant, ensign, [[Chief Petty Officer]], [[Warrant Officer]], and [[Petty Officer]]. The [[First Order starfighter corps]] used multiple ranks, including major,{{Resistance|The Recruit}} commander,''[[TIE Fighter Owners' Workshop Manual]]'' and lieutenant. The [[First Order Security Bureau]] also used multiple military ranks, such as colonel, commander,[[Poe Dameron 13|''Poe Dameron'' 13]] and lieutenant.[[Poe Dameron 7|''Poe Dameron'' 7]] ===Resistance=== [[File:Kor_Sella_CT.png|thumb|right|200px|Commander Korr Sella of the Resistance navy]] The [[Resistance]], was led by a general, although there were other generals within the organization.''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' Additionally, there were multiple flag officer ranks, including admiral, vice admiral,{{Film|VIII}} and commodore.{{Film|VII}} The [[Resistance navy]] additionally used the rank of naval captain and commander. The colonel rank was used by the [[Resistance Starfighter Corps]], which also used the ranks of commander, lieutenant commander, fighter captain, and lieutenant. The [[Resistance Army|ground forces]] used major, captain, lieutenant, and sergeant.''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: The Visual Dictionary]]'' Ensign was additionally used within the organization. Resistance military ranks were displayed on [[Resistance rank badge|rank badges]], red denoting army ranks and blue denoting naval ranks.''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]'' ===Sith Eternal=== [[File:SithTroopers-AoRTOCE.png|thumb|left|200px|A Sith Trooper lance corporal leads two corporals]] The [[Sith Eternal]] used multiple ranks within their [[Sith Eternal military|military]], including admiral, naval captain, [[Sith trooper]] [[commander]], [[Petty Officer|petty officer]], [[lance corporal]], and [[corporal]]. [[Allegiant General]] carried over from the First Order. ===Other factions=== Various factions used standard military ranks for their armed forces. [[Planetary defense forces]] and local [[planet]]ary armed forces used ranks such as general, admiral, captain, and others. The [[Mon Cala planetary defense services]] and [[Mon Calamari monarchy]] overall used the rank of [[Grand Admiral]],[[Star Wars (2015) 44|''Star Wars'' (2015) 44]] Admiral, Commander,[[Darth Vader (2017) 17|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 17]] [[Captain of the Guard]], [[Fleet Captain]],[[Star Wars (2015) 48|''Star Wars'' (2015) 48]] and [[Captain Third Class]].{{InsiderCite|issue1=207|issue2=208|Starlight: Shadows Remain}} The [[Gungan Grand Army]], in addition to the ranks of general and captain, also used the rank of [[Bombad General]].{{Film|I}} The [[Kilji Illumine]], a zealous [[Unknown Regions]] faction, was led by a [[Generalirius]], considered to be similar to [[Generalissimo]]. The [[Illumine Kilhorde]] consisted of the ranks of general and colonel. The [[Nikardun Destiny]], an Unknown Regions expansionist empire, was led by General [[Yiv]] the Benevolent, and the military ranks consisted of generals and [[tactical commander]]s. The leader of the [[Utapau Skyforce]] utilized the military rank of [[Air Commodore]]. [[Prince-Admiral]] was both a royal and military rank, used by [[Jonashe Solo]] of ancient [[Corellian royalty]]. ==Appearances== {{ScrollBox|content= *''[[The High Republic: Convergence]]'' {{Ab|The
